response.global_analysis: The video starts with a 3D animation skit (00:00-02:29) featuring no spoken dialogue, but prominent on-screen text was transcribed as secondary priority. The live performance of 'Soko ni Aru Kamo Shirenai...' begins at 02:30. Timestamps are strictly synchronized with Usada Pekora's vocal performance, using the burnt-in lyrics to ensure 100% accuracy in the transcription. Subtitle blocks are split at natural pauses to maintain semantic continuity and prevent text from lingering beyond its spoken duration.

subtitles.original: GO TO VIP ROOM
subtitles.english: GO TO VIP ROOM

subtitles.original: VIP / CLOSED
subtitles.english: VIP / CLOSED

subtitles.original: 君に会いたい時だって
subtitles.english: Even when I want to see you,

subtitles.original: どこか会えない気持ちがある
subtitles.english: there are times I feel I cannot meet you.

subtitles.original: だけど本当の優しさが
subtitles.english: But maybe true kindness

subtitles.original: そこにあるかも知れない
subtitles.english: is actually found there.

subtitles.original: そこにあるかも知れない・・・
subtitles.english: Maybe It's Right There...

subtitles.original: 人混みに揺られてる
subtitles.english: Being swayed by the crowd,

subtitles.original: どこかに宛があるわけじゃない
subtitles.english: it's not like I have a destination.

subtitles.original: 一人きり歩いても
subtitles.english: Even if I walk all alone,

subtitles.original: 何か解決することじゃない
subtitles.english: it doesn't solve anything.

subtitles.original: 自分が本当望んでる
subtitles.english: The feelings that I truly long for

subtitles.original: 気持ちはきっと
subtitles.english: are surely that

subtitles.original: これから二人で
subtitles.english: the two of us from now on

subtitles.original: 歩いて行くことさ
subtitles.english: will walk together.

subtitles.original: 君に会いたい時だって
subtitles.english: Even when I want to see you,

subtitles.original: どこか会えない気持ちがある
subtitles.english: there are times I feel I cannot meet you.

subtitles.original: だけど本当の優しさが
subtitles.english: But maybe true kindness

subtitles.original: そこにあるかも知れない
subtitles.english: is actually found there.

subtitles.original: 二人輝いた季節は
subtitles.english: The seasons when we both shined

subtitles.original: きっとこれからも続いていく
subtitles.english: will surely continue from now on.

subtitles.original: だから大切な未来に
subtitles.english: So, for our precious future,

subtitles.original: この想いを残したい
subtitles.english: I want to leave these feelings behind.

subtitles.original: 飽きるまで話しても
subtitles.english: Even if we talk until we're tired,

subtitles.original: 全部分かり合えるわけじゃない
subtitles.english: it's not like we'll understand everything.

subtitles.original: 言葉より伝えたい
subtitles.english: More than words, I want to convey

subtitles.original: 気持ちがこの胸にあふれてる
subtitles.english: the feelings overflowing in my heart.

subtitles.original: 君がいつか探した夢の
subtitles.english: The continuation of the dream

subtitles.original: 続きはきっと
subtitles.english: that you once searched for

subtitles.original: 二人で描いて行こう
subtitles.english: let's draw it together.

subtitles.original: 忘れないで
subtitles.english: Please don't forget.

subtitles.original: 独りきり孤独なようで
subtitles.english: Though it seems we're all alone,

subtitles.original: みんな何かに悩んでいる
subtitles.english: everyone is troubled by something.

subtitles.original: すぐには変わらないけれど
subtitles.english: Although things won't change immediately,

subtitles.original: とにかく信じていたい
subtitles.english: I want to believe, regardless.

subtitles.original: 流した涙拭って
subtitles.english: Wiping away the tears I shed,

subtitles.original: ずっと君のそばで生きたい
subtitles.english: I want to live by your side forever.

subtitles.original: いつか振り返った時に
subtitles.english: Because when I look back someday,

subtitles.original: 後悔したくないから
subtitles.english: I don't want to have any regrets.
